name: Dresser
description: The client is requesting a dresser to store her clothing. She is a mother of four children, including an infant, and due to her current financial situation, she is unable to afford one. Having a dresser would greatly benefit her and her family by providing safe and organized storage for their belongings.

name: Sofa
description: Client (F/33) is the sole breadwinner of her household and is currently living with her five children. She is seeking assistance in the form of a sofa for her family, as she is currently unable to afford this essential household furniture.

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Tanjong Pagar
contact.name: Norlizawati Binte Hamid

passiton.name: Sofa
passiton.description: Great Sofa bed in superb condition, bought 18 months ago from IKEA

name: Cupboard
description: 3 youth siblings living independently and would require cupboard for their items

name: Adult diapers
description: Client is a senior caregiver to her adult child with special needs. She is unemployed and is the main caregiver to her child and also husband with a history of stroke and heart conditions. With financial restrains, the family will benefit greatly from a sponsor for her child's diapers as they are a regular expense.

name: Nebulizer Machine
description: Client lives alone and has limited family support. She has been unemployed since 2014 due to asthma. Client reported ongoing depression and chronic skin condition since 2017, with no significant improvement despite ongoing medical treatment. Client shared that her doctor recommended the use of a nebulizer machine; however, she is unable to purchase one due to lack of income.(JM)

contact.org: THK Family Service Centre @ Bedok North
contact.name: Low Kim Yong

passiton.name: Suction machine and nebulizer
passiton.description: Bought for 2 years but used once only.

name: Microwave
description: Family consists of a single mum with 4 children living in a 2-room rental flat. The family requires a microwave for easier food preparation for the children when mum is working. They need either a halal microwave or a brand new one. Please Whatsapp me at 62319407 if you have a suitable one to donate, thank you.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Woodlands, Sembawang
contact.name: Fatimah Azzahrah

passiton.name: Panasonic Microwave Oven
passiton.description: Non halal, heavy used Microwave Oven. Usually used only for heating food. Still work well. Wear and tear can be seen.
passiton.location: Ang Mo Kio, Bishan, Braddell, Thomson

name: Vacuum Cleaner
description: Family of young couple with 5 children aged 0 to 4yo under financial stress due delay in support from SSO and husband unable work as a delivery driver due to PMD being confiscated. The family has poor social support.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Dishalani D/O Anbanathan

name: Vacuum Cleaner
description:
The household consists of two parents and six children residing in a 2-room public rental flat. Husband is the sole breadwinner, and the family experiences financial constraints in meeting their daily living expenses.

In early June 2026, client's three younger children were hospitalised due to environmental-triggered health conditions. Following medical concerns and in consideration of the children's health and hygiene needs, the family has decided to replace their old pillows and aged mattresses, which may be contributing to the environmental triggers.

Due to their limited financial means, the family is seeking assistance to obtain new pillows and mattresses for the children to provide a cleaner and healthier sleeping environment and to support their overall well-being.

name: Vacuum Cleaner
description: Family of 4 with a 60-year-old grandmother who serves as the sole caregiver for her three grandchildren aged 11, 10, and 9 years old. Their vacuum cleaner, which was donated has recently broken down, creating additional hardship for maintaining household cleanliness. Given grandmother's physically demanding work schedule, knee problems that limit her mobility, and responsibility for managing a household of four people, a functioning vacuum cleaner is essential for efficient home maintenance and ensuring a hygienic living environment for the children, making this replacement a critical practical need for the family's daily functioning.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Kreta Ayer
contact.name: Nurul Jannah Bointe Hafid

name: Vacuum Cleaner
description: Client is unfit for work with her chronic health issues and relies on SSO to support her 4 children. The family requested for vacuum cleaner for easier and faster and cleaner cleaning around the house.

contact.org: Allkin Family Service Centre @ Ang Mo Kio 230
contact.name: Norsiah Binte Mohd Basir

name: Bicycle
description:
Client, 11, cycles to school and tuition almost daily but his bicycle chain recently became loose and has been coming off when he cycles - which is dangerous and delays his travel time to school. His father is currently bedridden and has high care needs, and mother is the main caregiver, so parents are unable to afford to buy him a new one. The rest of his siblings are also school-going. A new bicycle will be of great benefit to him.

Thank you!

passiton.name: Exercise Bicycle  (non-electric)
passiton.description: Simple exercise bicycle with handlebars and feet pedals. Height of bike is adjustable.
passiton.location: Eunos, Geylang, Kembangan, Paya Lebar , Sims

name: Bicycle
description:
Client is a breast cancer survivor, has recently completed her treatment and suffered from multiple side effects (heart issues and swelling of eyes and nose). While her condition has improved, she is facing difficulties securing employment that is fit for her current condition.

Client is unemployed, living in a 1-room rental flat and without any family support. She hopes for a bicycle to allow her to do Grab to provide for herself.
